ads.author: Douglas Williams
ads.title: Arcade PCB Lot (16+ Boards) - Untested As-Is / Parts & Repair - Local Pickup 32246
ads.description: Selling a large, diverse collection of vintage arcade printed circuit boards (PCBs) as a single wholesale lot. Perfect for arcade restorers, hobbyists, or bench techs looking for winter projects, repair candidates, or valuable donor parts. $650 (OBO) Condition & Status: All boards are being sold strictly in unknown/untested condition, as-is, for parts or repair. They have not been bench-tested, and I cannot verify functionality. Please inspect the photos closely for board layouts, chip presence, and physical condition. What is included in the lot: • Zaxxon (Sega) • Ms. Pac-Man set • Super Pac-Man • 1942 (Capcom) • Choplifter • Mega Zone (Konami) • Double Dribble (Konami) • Sega G-80 Hardware System: • Sega G-80 Space Odyssey • Sega Astro Blaster (Sound PCB) • Shooters & Niche Titles: • Sky Soldiers • Zoar (Taito) • Birdie King (2 full board sets) • Taito Big Event Golf (w/ harness) • Champion Baseball • Champion Wrestler • Bally Senate boards Terms of Sale: • Local Pickup Only: Located in Jacksonville, FL (Zip Code 32246). • Sold as a Lot Only: I am not looking to split this collection up or sell individual boards at this time. • No Returns / No Guarantees: Due to the nature of vintage arcade electronics and the unknown functional status, all sales are final. *Cash or Venmo at pickup. Message me with any questions or to schedule a pickup time! Arcade, Arcade PCB, Jamma, Sega, Taito, Pacman, Retro Gaming, Coin op, Vintage Electronics, Capcom, Konami

ads.description: Vintage coin-operated pinball machine has a wooden cabinet with a black finish and a glass-covered playfield. A coin slot is located on the front panel.
